name: kuira-wp-dev-plugin
description: Kuira WP Dev Plugin — WordPress plugin developer toolkit. Scaffolds new WPCS-compliant plugins, enforces WordPress Coding Standards, routes UI/UX tasks to the Superpowers visual companion, audits security, and automates releases.
author: Mohammad Limon Mia

recommends.superpowers: obra/superpowers — install first for visual companion support
